change_notes: Moved 'Abbe' from given_names to name_prefix as it is a clerical title (Abbé), not a given name

single_name: Museum Moderner Kunst Stiftung Ludwig Wien

change_notes: Mechthild von Magdeburg is a medieval mystic known by a single historical name; consolidated into single_name, cleared family_name, given_names, and name_particles
Separated 'Freiherr' (noble title/suffix) from 'von' (particle); 'von' kept in name_particles, 'Freiherr' moved to name_suffix

Removed 'Baron' from name_particles as it is a title/honorific; however, since no prefix field was previously set, 'Baron' is moved to name_prefix. Retained only connective particle 'de la' in name_particles.
Corrected given_names from 'Edward' to 'Edvard' based on unified_id 'munch_edvard'
Moved 'Fürst' from name_particles to name_prefix as it is a title/honorific, not a connective particle
Set is_organisation to true; name clearly identifies a corporate entity (Mobil Oil A.G.)
Cleared family_name as the full name is already captured in single_name for this single/pen name identity
Split single_name 'Nicolaus von Kues' into given_names 'Nicolaus', name_particles 'von', and family_name 'Kues'
Moved 'd.Ä.' from name_particles to name_suffix as it is a generational suffix (der Ältere = the Elder), not a connective particle
'Freiherr' is a noble title/prefix, not a connective particle; moved 'Freiherr' to name_prefix and retained only 'von' in name_particles

Separated 'du' particle and 'Jourdin' from family_name 'Mollat Du Jourdin'; family_name set to 'Mollat', particle 'du' moved to name_particles, surname becomes 'Jourdin' — however, the correct full family name is 'Mollat du Jourdin' where 'Mollat' is the base surname and 'du Jourdin' is the particle+extension. Set family_name to 'Mollat', name_particles to 'du Jourdin'.
Separated 'Fürst von' in name_particles: moved 'Fürst' (honorific title) to name_suffix, kept only connective particle 'von' in name_particles

Removed 'von' from name_particles as it is part of the compound family name 'Meyer von Waldeck', not a connective particle between family and given name; corrected family_name casing to 'Meyer von Waldeck'
Corrected capitalization of family_name from 'Mcluhan' to 'McLuhan'
